profile: Carlos is a 52-year-old owner of a family-run Italian restaurant. He wakes up at 6 AM to go to the wholesale market for fresh ingredients, returns to prep the kitchen by 9 AM, and typically closes the restaurant around 11 PM. It's a 6-day work week with Mondays off. Physical activity comes from constant movement in the kitchen - standing, lifting supplies, and rushing during dinner service. Carlos doesn't track his health formally but has been feeling more tired lately. He has strong social connections through regular customers and his tight-knit family who helps run the business. His wife worries about his health and bought him a smartwatch last month. Meals are abundant but irregular - tasting dishes throughout the day rather than sitting down for proper meals. He enjoys his Monday off by sleeping in, having a long lunch with his wife, and taking a walk in the park.

scenes.description:
Ah finally a day off.
I'm gonna sleep in a bit longer.
My wife said she'll wake me up when she's ready for lunch.
Okay it's 11 AM already.
Time to get up.
Hey love I'm up.
Ciao bello! How are you feeling today?
I'm feeling alright a bit tired as usual.
You know I've been thinking we should take a walk in the park after lunch.
That sounds perfect I could use some fresh air.
I'll just get changed and we can head out.
Sounds good to me I'll start making lunch.
What do you think about making some pasta?
Mmm that sounds amazing.
I'll get the ingredients ready.

messages.content: Hey love I'm up
Ciao bello! How are you feeling today?
I'm feeling alright a bit tired as usual
You know I've been thinking we should take a walk in the park after lunch
That sounds perfect I could use some fresh air
I'll just get changed and we can head out
Sounds good to me I'll start making lunch. What do you think about making some pasta?
Mmm that sounds amazing. I'll get the ingredients ready

scenes.description:
I'm prepping for tonight's service.

My sous chef Marco is running late again.

I hope he's not stuck in traffic.

Okay he's here now.

Hey Marco what's going on?

Sorry boss I got held up.

No worries let's get moving we have a lot to do.

Alright so we need to plate those risottos.

And make sure the pasta station is set.

Got it I'll get on it.

I'm gonna go check on the orders.

See if everything's coming in on time.

Okay looks good so far.

The specials board is looking good tonight.

I think we're gonna be slammed.

messages.content: Hey Marco what's going on?
Sorry boss I got held up.
No worries let's get moving we have a lot to do.
Got it I'll get on it.
Hey love, just a heads up, we're gonna be slammed tonight. Marco's running a bit behind.
Alright so we need to plate those risottos. And make sure the pasta station is set.
/remind: 18:30 - Service starts! Let's get ready!
Be careful tonight, don't overdo it. Take a break if you need to.

scenes.description:
I'm closing up shop around 11 PM.

My wife is picking me up tonight.

I'm exhausted today's service was crazy.

Marco and I worked nonstop from 5 PM on.

The kitchen's spotless now though.

Time to go home and relax.

My wife asked me to take a look at some new menu ideas she found.

I hope I can focus on that and not just fall asleep.

The smartwatch she got me says I need to take it easy.

Yeah right like that's gonna happen.

calendar_events.title: Review New Menu Ideas with Wife

messages.content: Hey amor, almost done? I'm on my way
Yeah, just closing up. Kitchen's spotless
Great! I found some new menu ideas, can you take a look when I get there?
Will do, I'm beat though. Your smartwatch is haunting me
Haha, take it easy! You need to rest

scenes.description:
Okay it's 6 AM.
Time to get moving.
I'm heading to the wholesale market.
I need to get some fresh produce for today's menu.
Hey Sal how's it going?
Bene bene Carlo! You know same old same old.
What do you need today?
I'm looking for some good tomatoes and basil.
You came to the right place.
Let me show you what I have.
These tomatoes are from local farms.
Perfect for your sauces.
Grazie mille Sal you're a lifesaver.
I'll take a few crates of those.

messages.content: Hey Sal, how's it going?
Bene bene Carlo! You know same old same old. What do you need today?
I'm looking for some good tomatoes and basil.
You came to the right place. Let me show you what I have. These tomatoes are from local farms. Perfect for your sauces.
Grazie mille Sal, you're a lifesaver. I'll take a few crates of those.
Hey love, be careful today. Don't overdo it. Eat something before you start prepping
Hey bro, just got to the market. I'll pick up some extra bread for tonight
Morning team, just a reminder we have a full house for lunch today. Let's make sure we're prepped

scenes.description:
I'm taking a short break in the back office.

My wife just called to remind me that our daughter's birthday dinner is next week.

We should finalize the menu with her.

Okay let me call her back.

Hey sweetie what's up?

Not much just thinking about dinner for Sophia's birthday.

What do you think we should make?

I was thinking we could do the lasagna and some of her favorite desserts.

That sounds perfect.

I'll talk to Sophia and get her input.

Love you.

Love you too.

calendar_events.title: Discuss Sophia's Birthday Menu with Sophia

messages.content: Hey love, don't forget Sophia's birthday dinner is next week. We should finalize the menu with her.
Okay, let me call her back. Hey sweetie what's up?
Not much just thinking about dinner for Sophia's birthday. What do you think we should make?
I was thinking we could do the lasagna and some of her favorite desserts. That sounds perfect. I'll talk to Sophia and get her input. Love you.
Love you too.
